vel_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7286719036275035198","book_info":{"abstract":"暑假动物园打工，偶遇命案现场并激活金手指的警院学生秦风，从一具被扔在狮子园内的尸体开始，秦风被天河市局重案组组长看中。
之后连破腐尸案，特大入室盗窃案……
警院领导坚称：不是警院成就了秦风，而是秦风成就了警院，警院以秦风同学为荣。
天河市局：只要我方派出小秦警官，罪犯们就得小心了。
省厅：小秦组长不仅是天河市局的，也是全省的。
部委：我们要有大局观意识，不能有山头思想，小秦专家是全国的！
……

hor_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7394707738184729369","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"过程真的挺好看的，主角和家人月月之间的感情很好看，探案过程长但不怎么枯燥，其它角色塑造的也不错，林瑶的出现也不怎么突兀，下线也还行，和她感情戏没有这点非常值得表扬，和萧亦然也不要有感情戏，她的性格不合适，不讨喜，如果有女主，希望是双强，刑侦能力强悍，性格讨喜，我之前是喜欢男主努力独强无女主感情戏女配也没有的文，这篇文挺好看的，但后续就不知道是否出现女主，女主的形象塑造的是否讨喜，还有就是结局的问题就这3点，做好了应该是一篇好文，值得一看的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721717704,"group_id":"7286719036275035198","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个无比普通且傻屌的人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyEN4J9q2xLKburvqPHf5ZhQoKrEiek/Pm0d4gj0DA9b","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d50a77ffb61243c788d8651cc3e552d3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880107&x-signature=PNjMUQ4Didcl74ddsOYPC6ekn%2FA%3D","user_id":"3281421143399624","user_name":"无数问号"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3281421143399624","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7286719036275035198","book_info":{"abstract":"暑假动物园打工，偶遇命案现场并激活金手指的警院学生秦风，从一具被扔在狮子园内的尸体开始，秦风被天河市局重案组组长看中。
